headline: Q1 Earnings Roundup: Generac (NYSE:GNRC) And The Rest Of The Renewable Energy Segment
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Generac (NYSE:GNRC) and the best and worst performers in the renewable energy industry.
